title: Medical Escort and Transport (MET)
text:
Medical Escort and Transport (MET) - SupportGoWhere
Medical Escort and Transport (MET)
Share link
Provides transportation and/or someone to accompany those who are unable to travel independently to their medical appointments.
SERVICE HIGHLIGHTS
Fees payable
Referral required
Collapse all sections
About this support

A convenient transportation service with trained care aides to help frail seniors travel to and from their homes for medical appointments.

Who is this for?

Senior who:

Needs help to move around

Has no caregiver, or caregiver is unable to provide support because of their own health and physical condition

Is a Singapore Citizen (SC), Permanent Resident (PR) or foreigner

What to expect?

Subsidies are available depending on the means-test result.

Only applicable to SC and PR

Applicants for care services may need to fulfil the services’ eligibility criteria and providers’ service boundaries, if any, and enrolments are subject to availability of vacancies.

How to apply?

You will need to get a referral from a hospital, polyclinic or GP who is familiar with your loved ones’ condition and needs.

You may also contact the service provider for a discussion. Visit AIC’s website to search for service providers by postal code, address or your device’s current location.

For further assistance, contact the Agency for Integrated Care (AIC) at 1800 650 6060, email enquiries@aic.sg or walk in to a nearby AIC Link.

Information last updated on 04 Mar 2026
